title: DOCCOMMENT
text: DOCCOMMENT Adds an XML comment. DOCCOMMENT( Comment ) Parameters Table 1. DOCCOMMENT parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description Comment String IN Text to be added inside the comment tags; maximum length is 4096 bytes. Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. No text is added. Description Comments cannot be placed inside an XML element. The DOCCOMMENT operation must therefore follow a STARTDOCUMENT , ENDELEMENT or other DOCCOMMENT operation. Explain this code uxml2->docComment("This is comment AAA") Copy Result: <!--This is comment--> Explain this code uxml1->docComment("This is comment%%^BBB") Copy Result: <!--This is comment BBB--> Was this topic helpful?
